title: gelasia doriae
intro: Gelasia doriae, also known as the "Milk Flower," is a flowering plant species native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. Gelasia doriae has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
